name: Content Creation Pipeline
description: Create polished blog posts, articles, or social media content using AI for writing, images, and editing

steps.action: Draft the content with outline and key points
Refine tone, check accuracy, and improve structure
Generate accompanying images and graphics
Final grammar, clarity, and style polish

name: AI-Assisted Code Development
description: Plan, implement, review, and ship code faster using multiple AI coding tools together

steps.action: Plan architecture and design decisions
Implement code with AI-assisted editing
Review, test, and refactor across the full repo
CI/CD assistance and documentation

name: AI Video Production
description: Create professional videos from concept to final cut using AI at every step

steps.action: Write the script and storyboard
Generate voiceover narration
Create visual assets and backgrounds
Generate video clips from images and prompts
Create background music

name: Research & Knowledge Synthesis
description: Research a topic thoroughly using AI search, organize findings, and produce a comprehensive summary

steps.action: Research with citations — gather facts and sources
Synthesize findings into structured analysis
Organize sources and generate audio summary
Store, organize, and share the final output

name: AI Music Production
description: Create original music tracks with vocals, mix, and prepare for distribution

steps.action: Write lyrics and describe the musical style
Generate the full song with vocals
Fine-tune and edit specific sections (inpainting)
Generate alternative vocal tracks or voice effects

name: Business Process Automation
description: Automate repetitive business tasks using AI-powered workflow tools

steps.action: Map out the process and identify automation points
Connect apps and create automated workflows (Zaps)
Set up project tracking and documentation
Auto-polish all outgoing communications
